creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
A lot of bugs are Closed with maintainer-feedback still pending. Little hope remains for such bugs to be touched again. However, every flag? takes space under My Requests. And doing housekeeping afterwards causes unnecessary noise mail.

(Can you differentiate closed vs. open bugs in the following queue?)
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/request.cgi?requester=portmgr%40freebsd.org&requestee=portmgr%40freebsd.org&do_union=1&group=type&action=queue

Perhaps, closing a bug should require pending flags to be acted upon?
